payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed rectangular panels and a horizontal seam, showing a worn matte finish with scuffs and small scratches; object appears partially edge-cropped vertically in the image and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
